emails.subject: Deal 502952
emails.body: Deal 502952 Daren, Do you know if this deal was supposed to run through 12/00 and 1/01? It was a deal to buy 400 per day from Harman Operating and is currently in for 11/15/00 to 11/30/00. Volume management said they are looking for their money. Let me know. Thanks.
